articles.title: Ethereum Classic achieves strong bounce back, thanks to hash rate stimulation
articles.description: Ethereum Classic’s hash rate bounced back slightly, potentially indicating increased network activity. ETC’s bullish momentum might be limited, according to its MA indicators. Every once in a while, Ethereum Classic [ETC] registers a large price pump that is usually associated with whale activity. The latest such event occurred on 4 January, when ETC bulls pulled […]

articles.title: Forget Bitcoin and Ethereum, This XRP Price Candlestick Is Extremely Bullish
articles.description: The Bitcoin (BTC) price and the Ethereum (ETH) price have very similar price action, but ETH is moving upward at a faster rate. The XRP price saved a breakdown from a crucial support area by creating a bullish candlestick on Jan. 2. The post Forget Bitcoin and Ethereum, This XRP Price Candlestick Is Extremely Bullish appeared first on BeInCrypto.

articles.title: U.S. authorities to seize US$460 mln of Robinhood shares in FTX fraud case
articles.description: U.S. prosecutors are moving to seize the US$460 million worth of Robinhood Markets Inc., shares linked to Sam Bankman-Fried, the former chief executive officer of Bahamas-based bankrupt cryptocurrency exchange FTX.com
